reviews.review_description: No game, the gameplay is more repetitive than you could imagine, enemy arrows pass through walls, their are only 3 enemy types, and when you level up your units it feels very bland and flat, if I could rate it 0 stars I would, could only be worse if you couldn't play it at all, this should be a free app lab game that they slapped a 15$ price tag on, oh, and when you beat the game, you don't even go back to menu, and theirs no menu button, so you have to exit the game an restart it, talk about lazy…

developer_response.body: Hello! We're upset to hear that you didn't find our game enjoyable. We try our best to provide the best experience for our players.

reviews.review_description:
Fantasy and roguelike games are my jam, so this one was right up my alley
The gameplay had me hooked from the start, and I'm already thinking about all the ways it could be even better with some tweaks and improvements. I'm definitely keeping my eye on this one, hoping to see it grow into something even more epic

Great Rogue like!!!

(UPDATE)
I think I have a problem. After leveling up to two cards and two weapons, each time I restart, I deal less damage. The game is behaving backwards and so I find it impossible to finish it. Is it a bug? Can this be fixed in the next update?

developer_response.body: Hey! Thanks a lot for the feedback:) The more enemies you defeat and souls you gather, the stronger your opponents become. Use souls to upgrade cards in the Cave. This will make it easier to handle enemies and complete levels faster. If you still have questions please feel free to write in our Discord  https://discord.gg/zKpBYRbNqJ or email us info@xocus.co

reviews.review_description:
Gameplay Footage on my Youtube Channel
Didnt know what to expect from this jumping in but then found out its a roguelike. Each round you use your cards to throw your goblins to the ground to attack you can also shoot fire or ice from your hands also all takes mana. Then you die and you can then unlock more cards and upgrade them. Im not a huge fan of rogulikes as i get bored quick but i can see there potential in this game if you like that sort of gameplay loop.

The graphics are great and it plays really well. I could only get to level 3 but im sure if you keep grinding and upgrading your cards the better the game becomes. With a few issues on the tutorial is all i saw really so its one to check out.

developer_response.body: Thanks a lot for your feedback and Youtube gameplay! Your support is very important to us. We will check tutorial:)

reviews.review_description:
So far so good a great little strategy game of summoning card heros, throwing potions and using your own arcane powers of ice, fire and lightening to defeat foes ! 
Moving about and avoid being hot as your mana charges and your able to summon cards which you can upgrade and change at your workshop. 
So far sound gameplay, not really any bugs, great tutorial and great graphics ! 

25 PERCENT OFF IN MY BIO
It is One of the best games ever played I played the game for hours and hours and it’s still fun one of the best games on the on the quest store

developer_response.body: Thanks a lot! Glad to know you enjoy our game
